steps.title: Identify the growth pattern
steps.content: Each month the enrollment is $3\%$ greater than the previous month, so the new total is $1.03$ times the old total. This is exponential growth with base $1.03$.

steps.title: Write the exponential model
steps.content: Starting with $250$ members in March 2020 (when $m = 0$), after $m$ months the total is $$c = 250(1.03)^{m}.$$

steps.title: Compare with the choices
steps.content:
• A) $c = 250(0.03)^{m}$: base $0.03$ would shrink the total each month. Eliminated.
  • B) $c = 250(1.03)^{m}$: correctly applies a $3\%$ monthly increase.
  • C) $c = 250(1.3)^{m}$: represents a $30\%$ monthly increase, not $3\%$. Eliminated.
  • D) $c = 250(3)^{m}$: would triple the total each month. Eliminated.
That confirms B is correct.
